injury_patterns.description: Knife wound to abdomen, knife dimensions 36 x 1.5 cm, stabbing wound 4 x 5 cm. Penetrating abdominal trauma due to penetration of sharp object.
Obvious external injuries to his head (not examined in detail; second victim)

medical_observations: Two deceased Asian males found; primary victim (male, mid-30s, 219 cm tall) with knife wound to abdomen.
Second victim had head injury, not examined in detail in this report.
Blood stains on left ankle and right elbow of primary victim.
Pistol-like object (22 x 12 cm) and 7 metal bullets found at scene.
Blood footprints at scene do not match victims' sneakers; DNA analysis recommended.
Black gym bag found in fire hose reel cabinet containing blood-stained blue shirt, screwdriver, spanner, pliers, and papers.
Primary victim's wallet contained Security Guard ID of CHEUNG Tai-Wah, possible victim name.
Signs of struggle at scene, flipped chair, blood on fire hose reel cabinet.
Suggest further autopsy, liver temperature for time of death, DNA/fingerprint/ballistic analyses.

--- Page 1 ---
GE2302 Forensics & Modern Society
Crime Scene Investigation Report
Lau Wan Chi
54027644
Grouping: Golf
INCIDENT REPORT
[REDACTED_CASE_NUMBER]
Report Date: 2017-02-11
Report Time: 06:42 am Arrival Time: 06:46 am
Reporting Channel: The ““999” Police Emergency Line
Location of The Lucky Spirit Co. Ltd., Room 204, 2/F, Dai-Sing Industrial
Incident: Building, 684 Kung Fu Road, Kung Tong, KLN
Reporting Officer: [REDACTED_OFFICER_ID] [REDACTED_OFFICER_ID] N/A
Reporting Witness: LAM Wing Reporting Witness ID: HKID:
[REDACTED_HKID]
Victim/Reporting Witness Night-shift security guard of Dai-Sing Industrial
Relationship: Building
REPORTING OFFICERS’ NARRATIVE
Arrived the scene at Room 204 on the 2nd floor of Dai-Sang Industrial Building at 6:46
am. The premise is the main office of a trading company named The Lucky Spirit Co. Ltd.
Reported 2 unconscious Asian males with obvious external injuries, 1 to his head and
another to his abdomen. Preliminary assessment indicated that both men were already
dead. There were apparent signs of struggling at the scene, and 1 pistol-like object was
identified. Security guard [REDACTED_PERSON_NAME_TITLE] recognized both men to be frequent visitors to the
trading company.
Case Classification: Double Dead Body Found Case
Responsible Unit: Crime KLN East Region

--- Page 2 ---
CRIME SCENE REPORT
[REDACTED_CASE_NUMBER]
Incident Date: 2017-02-11
Crime Scene Investigator: LAU Wan Chi
Incident Location: The Lucky Spirit Co. Ltd., Room 204, 2/F, Dai-Sing
Industrial Building, 684 Kung Fu Road, Kung Tong, KLN
SUMMARY REPORT OF SCENE
Crime Scene Investigator’s Narrative:
Primary Body Examination:
Investigator arrived at 9:35 am. Investigator was directed through the hallway, and
found a dead body, male in his mid 30s, laying on the floor facing the floor with his
legs facing the door of Room 204. Visual inspection indicated the victim was
wearing light blue floral short-sleeved shirt, dark blue jeans with belt and sneakers.
The victim was 219 cm tall. Investigator verified the victim had no signs of life
including respiration and heartbeat and pronounced the victim deceased at 9:45
am.
A knife was found stabbing into the abdomen of the body, which was 36 x 1.5 cm;
with the stabbing wound of 4 x 5 cm. Blood found on left ankle of the victim’s foot
and right elbow. Apparent cause of death is penetrating abdominal trauma due to
penetration of sharp object.

--- Page 3 ---
Evidence Collected on Body:
1. 1 blue floral short-sleeved shirt, size M
2. 1 pair dark blue jeans, size M
3. 1 leather belt
4. 1 pair sneakers, blood stain on right foot sneaker
5. 1 knife
6. 1 pistol-liked object

--- Page 4 ---
7. 7 metal bullets
8. 1 Wallet
9. $180 cash (1 $100 note, 4 $20 notes)
10. 1 Security Guard ID of CHEUNG Tai-Wah
Opinions:
Apparent Manner of Death: Murder
Apparent Cause of Death: Penetrating Abdominal Trauma
Remarks:
1. Victim’s Name could be CHEUNG Tai-Wah
2. Possible immediate cause of death could be peritonitis, internal bleeding or
bowel content infection, suggest further autopsy
3. Suggest further checking on liver temperature to determine the actual time of
death.

--- Page 5 ---
Crime Scene Investigation:
3 Blood footprints found in the scene, 1 on the right corner of the pillar of the
building, 2 outside the fire exit. A wooden plate and a mob were found on the left
corner of the pillar of the building A flipped chair is outside the fire hose reel
cabinet. Blood stains were found on the edge and the handle of the fire hose reel
cabinet. A black gym bag was found in the fire hose reel cabinet. A blue blood-
stained shirt is found in the bag, with a screwdriver, a spanner and a pair of pliers. 2
pieces of papers are found under the bag inside the fire hose reel cabinet.
Remarks:
1. Bloody footprints did not match with sneakers of victims
2. Suggest DNA Analysis on all blood stains and footprints
3. Suggest further fingerprint analysis on the fire hose reel cabinet handle and
fire exit handle
4. Suggest further investigation on the fire exit ladder of the building
5. Evidence details and position sees crime scene floor plan and inventory of
evidence

--- Page 6 (empty) ---


--- Page 7 ---

Suggest fingerprint analysis on #7-11, 13-19
Suggest ballistic analysis on #18, 19

Reported 2 unconscious Asian males with obvious external injuries, 1 to his head and

identified. Security guard Mr. LAM recognized both men to be frequent visitors to the
